MercadoLibre misses profit estimates as Brazil free-shipping boost hurts margins SAO PAULO (Reuters) -Latin American e-commerce giant MercadoLibre on Monday missed analysts' estimates for second-quarter net profit and core earnings, as increased free shipping in Brazil drove sales up but also hit margins.  MercadoLibre, Latin America's largest company by market value, reported net income of $523 million for the quarter through the end of June, down 1.5% year-on-year and below the $596 million expected by analysts in an LSEG poll.
